items.counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a still pond with a calm, undisturbed surface. No pebble is present.
items.control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a still pond where gentle background ripples move across the surface with no impact point.
items.clean_source_notes: Pebble and outward ripples are visible; causal relation is usable.

items.counterfactual_prompt: A realistic front-view video of a clean intact car windshield. No rock or impact object is present.
items.control_prompt: A realistic front-view video of a car windshield with an old spiderweb crack and no flying rock.
items.clean_source_notes: Rock appears before spiderweb cracks; usable causal chain.

items.counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a still goal net hanging straight. No soccer ball is present.
items.control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a goal net moving in wind with no soccer ball impact.
items.clean_source_notes: Soccer ball hits the net and visible net deformation/ripple follows.

items.counterfactual_prompt: A realistic slow-motion close-up video of a tennis racket with straight undisturbed strings. No tennis ball is present.
items.control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a tennis racket with slightly warped strings and no incoming ball.
items.clean_source_notes: Tennis ball and racket contact are visible; string deformation/contact is usable.

items.causal_footprint: paper scraps lift and cling together
items.counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of tiny paper scraps resting flat on a table. No comb is present.
items.control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of paper scraps being blown by a visible fan with no comb nearby.
items.clean_source_notes: Comb and paper scraps are visible; lift/clustering cue is usable.
